nasb.text: Some of the heads of fathers’ households, when they arrived at the house of the Lord which is in Jerusalem, offered willingly for the house of God to restore it on its foundation.

esv.text: Some of the heads of families, when they came to the house of the Lord that is in Jerusalem, made freewill offerings for the house of God, to erect it on its site.

cnv.text: 當一些族長到達耶路撒冷耶和華殿的原址的時候，就為　神的殿甘心獻上禮物，要把殿在原址重建起來。

ccb.text: 有些族长来到耶路撒冷耶和华的殿时，甘愿为上帝的殿献上礼物，用来在旧址上重新建殿。
